## Current Process

Describe the current coordination step, handoff, or operating rule.

## Problem

Describe the failure mode, friction, or ambiguity you observed.

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the smallest process change that would resolve the issue.

## Impacted Areas

List the role folders, shared docs, or scripts involved.

## Additional Notes

Add any follow-up context, examples, or risks.
